description: Golden squat trace fixtures: minimal pass/fail contract for SquatMotionEvidenceEngineV2 (future).

fixtures.description: Real-device shallow down-up-return; V2 must yield usable lower-body flexion/extension motion evidence (pass).
Real-device deep down-up-return; V2 must yield usable motion evidence (pass).
Standing / non-cycle trace; V2 must not mark usable evidence (fail).
Seated or bottom-hold without valid return; V2 must not mark usable evidence (fail).
